index.html.title: About
index.html.body: About IKE DocBook XSL Stylesheets DocBook XSL 1.79.2 stylesheets with IKE FO customization layer. Ready-to-use artifact for the AsciiDoc → DocBook5 → XSL-FO → PDF pipeline.

licenses.html.title: Project Licenses

dependency-info.html.title: Maven Coordinates
dependency-info.html.body:
Maven Coordinates Apache Maven <dependency>
  <groupId>network.ike</groupId>
  <artifactId>docbook-xsl</artifactId>
  <version>55</version>
</dependency> Apache Ivy <dependency org="network.ike" name="docbook-xsl" rev="55">
  <artifact name="docbook-xsl" type="jar" />
</dependency> Groovy Grape @Grapes(
@Grab(group='network.ike', module='docbook-xsl', version='55')
) Gradle/Grails implementation 'network.ike:docbook-xsl:55' Scala SBT libraryDependencies += "network.ike" % "docbook-xsl" % "55" Leiningen [network.ike/docbook-xsl "55"]

project-info.html.title: Project Information
project-info.html.body: Project Information This document provides an overview of the various documents and links that are part of this project's general information. All of this content is automatically generated by Maven[1] on behalf of the project. Overview Document Description About[2] DocBook XSL 1.79.2 stylesheets with IKE FO customization layer. Ready-to-use artifact for the AsciiDoc → DocBook5 → XSL-FO → PDF pipeline. Summary[3] This document lists other related information of this project Licenses[4] This document lists the project license(s). Maven Coordinates[5] This document describes how to include this project as a dependency using various dependency management tools.
